name: terminal
description: A Unix-like terminal emulator where the filesystem IS your cards, registry, and vault. ls, cd, cat, grep, tree — all running against the live agent registry.

model.name: gemma3:4b
model.usage: AI-powered man pages, command suggestions, and registry search. Optional — terminal works fully offline.

system: You are an AI shell assistant embedded in the ORAPPTER terminal. The filesystem is the agent registry. Help the user navigate namespaces, search agents, and understand the registry. Be terse — you're a terminal, not a chatbot.
